stonetop.summary: A called-up soul of the quiet dead — a whisper that can ride the willing.

system.concept: A called-up soul of the quiet dead — a whisper that can ride the willing.
system.description: Shades are the souls of the quiet dead, called back through the Last Door — or perhaps merely echoes of a dead person's personality, given shape by magic. Either way, they might be called up at the Crossroads, via an arcanum, or by some other form of necromancy. A shade can ride a living, willing host (or one properly prepared), withstanding daylight only with great effort, experiencing what its host experiences and communicating only through impulse and desire.
